nasb.text: and build an altar to the Lord your God on the top of this stronghold in an orderly manner, and take a second bull and offer a burnt offering with the wood of the Asherah which you shall cut down.”

esv.text: and build an altar to the Lord your God on the top of the stronghold here, with stones laid in due order. Then take the second bull and offer it as a burnt offering with the wood of the Asherah that you shall cut down.”

cnv.text: 在這堅固的地方上面，你要整整齊齊為耶和華你的　神築一座祭壇，拿第二頭牛作燔祭，用你砍下來的亞舍拉作柴。”

ccb.text: 然后，在这座山顶上把石头堆放整齐，为你的上帝耶和华筑一座祭坛，用砍倒的亚舍拉神像作柴，把那头牛献作燔祭。”
